name: data-warehouse-analytics-alerting-rules-engine
description: T183 AlertingRulesEngine — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Alert rules from FREEDOM config. Alert evaluation tenant-scoped. Alert emission includes tenantId.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: alert rules from FREEDOM config (NEVER hardcoded), tenant-scoped evaluation, tenantId in alert emission, no cross-tenant alert
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + freedom-alert-rules + tenant-scoped-alert + alert-emission patterns for T183

Break T183 into: consume queue or scheduled trigger → load alert rules from FREEDOM config → evaluate metrics against rules (tenant-scoped) → for each triggered rule: storeDocument(alertRecord) → emit AlertFired with tenantId

Generate alerting-rules-engine.service.ts — queue consumer or scheduled trigger. ALL alert rules loaded from FREEDOM config (rule conditions, thresholds, severity). Alert evaluation is tenant-scoped from ALS. AlertFired emission MUST include tenantId. NEVER hardcode rule conditions or thresholds. DNA-8: storeDocument(alertRecord) BEFORE emitting AlertFired.
Named check validation: alert_rules_from_freedom_config, tenant_scoped_evaluation, tenant_id_in_alert_emission, no_hardcoded_rules, store_before_alert_emit
Score generated code 0-100 against T183 iron rules: FREEDOM config rules, tenant isolation in evaluation, tenantId in alert, DNA-8
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=freedom-config-rules+tenant-scoped-eval+tenant-id-in-alert, rejected=hardcoded-rules OR cross-tenant-evaluation OR alert-without-tenant-id. curriculumTier=1.
